overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character exploring a rainy New Orleans-style French Quarter courtyard at night, then proceeding through narrow passages onto a muddy historic street with tram tracks. The scene features atmospheric gas lighting, wet cobblestones, and detailed period architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: courtyard with central fountain surrounded by balconied buildings

agents.ego_description: walking around the circular fountain, examining the rainy courtyard environment

entered.detail: round stone fountain with water basin and central lamp post
tall cast-iron street lamp with warm yellow glow
simple wooden bench against the building wall
arched stone doorway leading to narrow passage
large terracotta pots stacked near the wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks around a central stone fountain in a rainy courtyard surrounded by historic buildings with wrought-iron balconies. Warm gaslight illuminates the wet cobblestones as rain falls steadily. The environment is enclosed and intimate, with potted plants and wooden benches lining the walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow covered passage between stone buildings

events.description: character walks through stone archway from open courtyard into narrow passage
exiting darker passage area into brighter street opening ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through the stone archway into a narrow passage between buildings

entered.detail: rough stone wall of the narrow alleyway
small lantern mounted on the passage wall

segments.scene_description: The character passes through the stone archway into a narrow, covered passage between buildings. The space is tight and enclosed, with wall-mounted lanterns providing dim illumination. Rain is partially sheltered here, and the cobblestones give way to a darker, more confined corridor leading toward the distant lights of the main street.

scene_state.functional_zone: muddy historic street with tram tracks and storefronts

events.description: exits narrow passage onto main street with tram tracks and historic buildings
character pauses briefly to look around before continuing down the street

agents.ego_description: walking down the muddy street past the bookstore and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: group of men standing and conversing near a storefront awning
figures sitting on the porch of the building

entered.detail: three-story historic building with BOOKSELLER sign and wrought-iron balcony
metal tram rails embedded in the muddy road surface
stacked wooden barrels on the sidewalk
tall street lamps illuminating the muddy road

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the narrow passage, the character steps onto a wide, muddy street with tram tracks running down the center. The historic Bookseller building dominates the left side with its illuminated signage and balconies. Sparse groups of NPCs stand near storefronts or sit on porches as rain continues to fall. The camera follows the character walking down the atmospheric street lined with gas lamps and period architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an intimate, rainy courtyard into the expansive, atmospheric bustle of a historic city street. It begins by circling a central stone fountain amidst wrought-iron balconies and warm gaslight, where rain falls steadily on wet cobblestones. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts into a narrow, covered stone passage, transitioning from the open courtyard to a dim and confined corridor illuminated by wall-mounted lanterns. The space then opens up as the character emerges from the archway onto a wide, muddy street featuring central tram tracks and the illuminated signage of the Bookseller building. Finally, the camera follows the character down this rain-slicked thoroughfare, passing sparse groups of people under the glow of period gas lamps and towering architecture.
